executiveSummary.currentState: Shaw has completed films for its 2026 conference story and Amplify. AI Advisor is at direction selection and Insight is planned.
executiveSummary.topImprovement: Coordinate Films 2, 3, and 4 through one message hierarchy and continuity review.
executiveSummary.risks: Unverified product behavior must not be presented as confirmed functionality.
executiveSummary.recommendation: Lock Film 3 only after checking its role alongside the completed Amplify film and planned Insight film.
executiveSummary.positioning: Spectrum is the central platform story; Amplify, AI Advisor, and Insight should feel intentionally connected.
executiveSummary.source: Confirmed Shaw product, film, and portal canon — Jul 23, 2026
